title: willardia schiedeana
intro: Willardia schiedeana, also known as Mexican willardia, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, native to Mexico. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthelmintic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Willardia schiedeana include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea, dysentery, and stomach pain, as well as its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are usually made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, creating a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
